case_title: KBR INC., DBA RASH CURTIS & ASSOCIATES vs. SHAIE, FADHL A.

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KBR INC., DBA RASH CURTIS & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT SHAIE, FADHL A. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-19-1993
